targets.expr:
sum(
  increase(adguard_query_type_total[$__rate_interval])
  or (
    label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "A", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "AAAA", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "CAA", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "CNAME", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "HTTPS", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "MX", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "NS", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "PTR", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "SOA", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "SRV", "", "")
    or label_replace(vector(0.01), "type", "TXT", "", "")
  )
) by (type)
